name: ExcelCompare
tagline: Compare two Excel files side-by-side and spot differences instantly, 100% free in your browser.
shortDesc: Free online Excel comparison tool that highlights differences with color-coded visuals. Supports .xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, and .xlsb formats. No upload needed — files are processed locally in your browser for maximum privacy.
longDesc: ExcelCompare is a browser-based tool that lets you compare two Excel files side-by-side with instant, color-coded difference highlighting. Key features include: synchronized scrolling for aligned views, visual diff for changes/additions/deletions, column comparison, key-value matching, and cross-sheet list checking. Files are processed entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server, making it ideal for sensitive business data. It supports all major spreadsheet formats (.xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, .xlsb) and requires no installation, no account, and no formulas. Trusted by financial analysts, project managers, auditors, and operations teams to eliminate human error and save hours of manual cross-referencing every week.

name: SBTI Personality Test
tagline: The hottest entertainment personality quiz of 2026 — 5 models, 15 dimensions, 27 personality types revealed in 5 minutes.
shortDesc: SBTI is a free, no-signup entertainment personality test with 5 models, 15 dimensions, and 31 fun questions. Pure frontend — your data never leaves your browser. Get a shareable result image in 5-8 minutes.
longDesc: SBTI is an entertainment-oriented personality test that goes beyond MBTI with five cross-analysis models (Self, Emotion, Attitude, Action Drive, Social) and fifteen dimensions. It delivers 27 unique personality tags — from CTRL (The Manipulator) to GOGO (The Go-Go) — each with in-depth, humorously accurate descriptions. The test features 31 randomly-ordered questions, hidden personality easter eggs, and a personality radar visualization. Everything runs purely in the browser with zero data upload, ensuring complete privacy. Results come with a shareable image perfect for social media. Free, no account needed, no phone number required.

name: BottleneckChecker
tagline: Analyze CPU, GPU, RAM, and storage bottlenecks in your PC build with a data-driven calculator — get actionable upgrade paths in seconds.
shortDesc: Free online PC bottleneck calculator that analyzes CPU, GPU, RAM, storage, and cooling to identify performance bottlenecks. Uses real-world benchmarks from 10,000+ configurations. Supports gaming, video editing, streaming, and 3D rendering use cases at 1080p, 1440p, and 4K.
longDesc: BottleneckChecker is a comprehensive PC bottleneck calculator that goes beyond simple CPU-GPU pairing. It analyzes the full system — including RAM capacity and speed, storage type, cooling adequacy, and monitor resolution — against a database of 10,000+ real-world benchmark results. The tool provides purpose-specific analysis for gaming, video editing, 3D rendering, and streaming, adjusting performance weighting based on your actual use case. Results include a bottleneck percentage, system health score, component utilization estimates, and specific upgrade recommendations with expected performance gains and cost-benefit analysis. Updated weekly with new hardware releases and benchmarks. Free, no signup required, fully responsive for mobile use.
